meaning: n.奖章,勋章,纪念章v.授予...奖章
examples: She walked away with the gold medal.
She is hoping to win the gold medal.
Curtis is on track for the gold medal.
Every time I see the medal now, I see the village it took to earn it.
She was part of Australia's gold medal winning 4x400m team at the Commonwealth Games in Manchester last year.
